parents.subject: LU-10680 mdd: disable changelog garbage collection by default

commit.subject: LU-10541 llite: setxattr directly in ll_set_acl
commit.message:
LU-10541 llite: setxattr directly in ll_set_acl

In ll_set_acl, ll_xattr_set_common or ll_setxattr_common
is used directly to avoid the need to pass inode by dentry
for the requirement of kernel xattr_handler.

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs clientdistro=sles12sp3

Change-Id: I8c68be2e13886961142a413cb06c1d6dff52a20d
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao.zhang@intel.com>
